title: Apocrypha: The Great Holy Grail War
overview: Decades have passed since the Greater Grail was taken from Fuyuki. The Mage’s Association asks Kairi Sisigou to take part in the Great Holy Grail War.

title: The Saint Departs
overview: Despite harboring doubts about her unusual summoning, Ruler heads to the battleground in Trifas, Romania, to preside over the Great Holy Grail War.

title: The First Steps of Fate
overview: A young homunculus boy tries to escape after waking up inside a tank. Just as his strength gives out, Rider of Black appears.

title: Life's Cost, Death's Redemption
overview: Berserker of Red approaches the Black Faction stronghold. The Yggdmillennia clan and their Servants seize the opportunity to take action.

title: Voice From Above
overview: Saber of Black vanishes after giving his heart to the young homunculus boy. Ruler swears to do everything in her power to grant him his freedom.

title: The Knight of Rebellion
overview: Believing a Servant could be behind the string of gruesome murders terrorizing Romania, the Mage's Association sends in Kairi to investigate.

title: Where Freedom Lies
overview: Fiore battles Sisigou after traveling to Sighișoara in pursuit of Assassin of Black. In the face of danger, a familiar figure rushes to her side.

title: The War Begins
overview: The Great Holy Grail War enters a new phase as the Black and Red factions engage in an all-out conflict. Ruler and Sieg both head to the battlefield.

title: A Hundred Flames, A Hundred Flowers
overview: With the battles raging on, the Rider of Red learns who the Archer of Black is, forcing him to take on his former master.

title: Like Scattered Petals
overview: Sieg stands up to fight a formidable foe and protect his savior, the Rider of Black. Though weak, he's soon joined by a hell-bent Berserker of Black.

title: Eternal Radiance
overview: The battle between the Lancers of Red and Black heats up, yet they remain gridlocked. Watching, Darnic hatches a plan to get what he wants.

title: The Saint's Triumphant Return
overview: Ruler and the Black Faction rush into the Sky Garden in chase of the Red Faction, who are now in possession of the Greater Grail.

title: The Last Master
overview: Sieg admits that he can't give up his desire to help his brethren, and the Rider of Black gives him his full support. Until Celenike shows up.

title: Prayer of Salvation
overview: Despite Roche's blind admiration for Avicebron, the Caster of Black reveals to Roche his deep-seated reasons for turning on the Black Faction.

title: Though Our Paths Diverge
overview: To stop Shiro, acting head of the Yggdmillennia clan Fiore proposes a joint attack on the Hanging Garden with Sisigou and others.

title: Jack the Ripper
overview: When the mysterious Jack the Ripper resurfaces to slaughter more magi, Fiore forms a plan to corner the killer.

title: Traumerei
overview: While walking through town in hopes of luring out Jack the Ripper, Sieg and Jeanne observe the townspeople and discuss what it means to be human.

title: From Hell
overview: Pulled into Jack the Ripper's nightmare filled with lost and abandoned children, Jeanne makes a fateful decision to lay the lost souls to rest.

title: The Last First Light
overview: The Hanging Garden is moving out of range, with the chance for a final battle swiftly approaching. Caules pushes Fiore to make a choice.

title: Dashing in the Sky
overview: The Yggdmillennia alliance make their final preparations before setting out for the Hanging Garden. Jeanne reminds Sieg of the power that lies within him.

title: Scorpio Shot
overview: Chiron battles his former disciple, Achilles, in a bare-knuckle fight. As Astolfo and Sieg attack the Hanging Garden, Sieg makes a fateful decision.

title: Reunion and Separation
overview: Mad with fury and unable to forgive Ruler for what she did to the Jack the Ripper children, Atalanta challenges her to a battle to the death.

title: Far Beyond
overview: A merciless attack by Semiramis leaves Kairi and Mordred heavily wounded. Shakespeare leads Jeanne down a painful journey into her past.

title: The Holy Grail War
overview: Shiro declares that he's attained Third Magic and is now able to "save the world," but Jeanne firmly believes that he's wrong in his beliefs.

title: Apocrypha
overview: Shiro and Semiramis make peace with themselves as their world crumbles around them. Young Sieg makes a shattering choice in an attempt to change fate.
